title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Flipkart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Flipkart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Flipkart in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
